{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323194150AE8DE704EBC027D13B55"}"},"total":977},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7392241905501635353","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"二十年老书虫推荐，好看。
有金手指，而且金手指的作用既不喧宾夺主，也不是毫无存在感，它在每一个资源点都默默为主角的强大奉献力量，比大多数小白文的金手指都好。
主角的性格设置也很不错，人在异界，完全利己，不受道德绑架，也不圣母博爱，杀伐果断，干净利落。就算是女人也只走肾不走心，对自己的女人照顾也很隐晦，没有掏心掏肺，但照顾还是有的。
情节上，不是千篇一律的公路求生模式，而是类似于副本一样的情节设定，很赞，写出了心意，推荐。","text_exts":[{"e":107,"s":103,"text":"道德绑架","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%81%93%E5%BE%B7%E7%BB%91%E6%9E%B6&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177426611027D13B55%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227392241905501635353%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227358233422608747582%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%81%93%E5%BE%B7%E7%BB%91%E6%9E%B6%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":182,"s":178,"text":"公路求生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%85%AC%E8%B7%AF%E6%B1%82%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177426611027D13B55%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227392241905501635353%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227358233422608747582%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%85%AC%E8%B7%AF%E6%B1%82%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721143223,"group_id":"7358233422608747582","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个老小白，看了不少书，试着写一点儿，记录内心的一些想法。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7nX5IUc6qIR01q8kYWUZy56w5KqGKU3UmzYTI3w+xSW","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2532872097119790","user_name":"试毒大叔"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2532872097119790","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7358233422608747582","book_info":{"abstract":"【荒野+求生+灾难+变异生物+升级+绝对利益+天赋】
【公路求生：开局觉醒金色传说】
全民穿越，叶离一觉醒来，进入到了公路求生的世界中。
一人一车，要想生存，就要在无尽的公路上驰骋下去，搜寻需要的物资。
就在叶离不知道该怎么办的时候。
耳畔突然传来一阵空灵的声音。
恭喜您觉醒金色传说天赋。
【金色传说】
【你的运气前所未有的提高，灾难永远和你擦肩而过，开箱永远是金色闪光。】
【你是天选，亦是唯一。】
在其他玩家还在每天挨冻受饿，甚至面临生命危险的时候。
叶离已经开始坐着房车，享受生活了。
叶离看着面前梨花带雨的女明星满脸狡黠之色。
“你，你想干什么？”
“美女，你也不想被抛尸荒野，成为那些怪物的食物吧！去把身体洗干净！”
1-78：草原永夜
79-135：沙漠高温
136-350：废土噬魂
351~541：机械飞升
542~692：花果山福地
693~829：亡灵之地&虚空试炼之地
830~935：死亡海域
